indexes.indexdef: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX orders_pkey ON public.orders USING btree (id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX orders_order_number_unique ON public.orders USING btree (order_number)
CREATE INDEX idx_ord_acc_status_date ON public.orders USING btree (account_id, status, created_at)
CREATE INDEX idx_ord_acc_phone ON public.orders USING btree (account_id, customer_phone)
CREATE INDEX idx_ord_acc_name ON public.orders USING btree (account_id, customer_name)
CREATE INDEX idx_ord_acc_number ON public.orders USING btree (account_id, order_number)
CREATE INDEX idx_ord_acc_date ON public.orders USING btree (account_id, created_at)
CREATE INDEX orders_lead_id_index ON public.orders USING btree (lead_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_ord_acc_carrier_shipdate ON public.orders USING btree (account_id, shipping_carrier_code, shipping_dispatched_at)
CREATE INDEX idx_ord_acc_tracking ON public.orders USING btree (account_id, shipping_tracking_code)
CREATE INDEX idx_orders_converted_from_order_id ON public.orders USING btree (converted_from_order_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_orders_account_kind_deleted_created ON public.orders USING btree (account_id, order_kind, deleted_at, created_at)
CREATE INDEX idx_orders_account_return_deleted_created ON public.orders USING btree (account_id, is_return_order, deleted_at, created_at)
CREATE INDEX idx_orders_account_type_deleted_created ON public.orders USING btree (account_id, order_type, deleted_at, created_at)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX order_items_pkey ON public.order_items USING btree (id)
CREATE INDEX idx_ord_items_order_id ON public.order_items USING btree (order_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_ord_items_product_id ON public.order_items USING btree (product_id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX customers_pkey ON public.customers USING btree (id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX customers_account_id_email_unique ON public.customers USING btree (account_id, email)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX customers_account_id_phone_unique ON public.customers USING btree (account_id, phone)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX products_pkey ON public.products USING btree (id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX products_sku_unique ON public.products USING btree (sku)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX products_slug_unique ON public.products USING btree (slug)
CREATE INDEX idx_prod_category_id ON public.products USING btree (category_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_prod_account_id ON public.products USING btree (account_id)

CREATE INDEX idx_prod_acc_date ON public.products USING btree (account_id, created_at, id)
CREATE INDEX idx_products_name_trgm ON public.products USING gin (immutable_unaccent((name)::text) gin_trgm_ops)
CREATE INDEX idx_products_sku_trgm ON public.products USING gin (immutable_unaccent((sku)::text) gin_trgm_ops)
CREATE INDEX products_inventory_import_starred_idx ON public.products USING btree (inventory_import_starred)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX order_attribute_values_pkey ON public.order_attribute_values USING btree (id)
CREATE INDEX idx_ord_attr_val_lookup ON public.order_attribute_values USING btree (order_id, attribute_id)
